tasks.instruction: Draw a straight horizontal line as smoothly as you can in one continious motion. Start at the dot.
tasks.label: Straight Line (H)

tasks.instruction: Draw a straight vertical line as smoothly as you can in one continious motion. Start at the dot.
tasks.label: Straight Line (V)

tasks.instruction: Trace the arc guide as smoothly as you can in one continious motion. Start at the dot.
tasks.label: Arc (H)

tasks.instruction: Trace the arc guide as smoothly as you can in one continious motion. Start at the dot.
tasks.label: Arc (V)

tasks.instruction: Trace the wave guide as smoothly as you can in one continious motion. Start at the dot.
tasks.label: Wave (H)

tasks.instruction: Trace the wave guide as smoothly as you can in one continious motion - Do not lift your pen from the screen. Start at the dot.
tasks.label: Wave (V)

tasks.instruction: Trace the spiral starting from the centre dot and working outward - Do not lift your pen from the screen.
tasks.label: Round Spiral

tasks.instruction: Trace the square spiral starting from the centre dot and working outward - Do not lift your pen from the screen.
tasks.label: Square Spiral

tasks.instruction: Write the words shown below clearly and naturally, on the lines provided.
tasks.label: Healthy Control
